parameters.text:
Extract receipt data from image.

Return only valid JSON.
No markdown.
Do not truncate JSON.
Use null for unknown values.

Fields:
shop_name,
receipt_date,
total_amount,
currency,
items.

Each item:
item_name_original,
item_language,
quantity,
unit_price,
amount.

Rules:

- item_language must be ISO 639-1 language code.
- Allowed values:
  en, ru, es, fr, de, kk, pt, it.
- Never return language names.
- Return "es" instead of "Spanish".
- Return "ru" instead of "Russian".
- Return "en" instead of "English".
- Preserve item_name_original exactly as printed on the receipt.

parameters.query:
insert into moneytrack.receipts (
user_id,
receipt_fingerprint,  
transaction_id,
telegram_file_id,
receipt_date,
shop_name,
total_amount,
currency,
raw_ai_json,
status
)
select
u.id,
'{{ $("Build receipt fingerprint").item.json.receipt_fingerprint }}',  
{{ $('Insert transaction').item.json.id }},
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_file_id }}',
coalesce(nullif('{{ $("Parse receipt JSON").item.json.receipt_date }}','null')::date,to_timestamp({{ $('Get user context').first().json.message_date }})::date),
'{{ $("Parse receipt JSON").item.json.shop_name }}',
{{ $("Parse receipt JSON").item.json.total_amount }},
'{{ $("Parse receipt JSON").item.json.currency }}',
'{{ JSON.stringify($("Parse receipt JSON").item.json).replaceAll("'","''") }}'::jsonb,
'parsed'
from moneytrack.app_users u
where u.telegram_user_id={{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
returning id;

insert into moneytrack.transactions(user_id,account_id,transaction_type,amount_original,currency_original,amount_base,currency_base,exchange_rate,description,transaction_date,source_type)
select 
  u.id,
  {{ $("Resolve account").item.json.account_id }},
  'expense',
  {{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.total_amount }},
  '{{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.currency }}',
  {{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.total_amount }},
  '{{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.currency }}',
  1,
  '{{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.shop_name }}',
  coalesce(nullif('{{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.receipt_date }}','null')::timestamp,current_timestamp),
  'receipt'
from moneytrack.app_users u
where u.telegram_user_id={{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
returning id;

with input_data as (
    select
        {{ $json.receipt_id }}::bigint as receipt_id,
        '{{ String($json.item_name_original || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text as item_name_original,
        {{ $json.item_language ? "'" + $json.item_language + "'" : "null" }}::text as item_language,
        {{ $json.quantity }}::numeric as quantity,
        {{ $json.unit_price }}::numeric as unit_price,
        {{ $json.amount }}::numeric as amount,
        {{ $json.category_id || "null" }}::bigint as category_id
),

user_row as (
    select id as user_id
    from moneytrack.app_users
    where telegram_user_id =
    {{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
),

upserted as (
    insert into moneytrack.product_catalog (
        user_id,
        product_key,
        original_name,
        original_language,
        category_id,
        is_active,
        created_at
    )
    select
        u.user_id,
        lower(regexp_replace(i.item_name_original, '[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+', '_', 'g')),
        i.item_name_original,
        i.item_language,
        i.category_id,
        true,
        now()
    from input_data i
    cross join user_row u
    where i.item_name_original <> ''
    on conflict (user_id, product_key)
    do update set
        original_name = excluded.original_name,
        original_language = coalesce(moneytrack.product_catalog.original_language, excluded.original_language),
        is_active = true
    returning id, category_id
)

select
    i.receipt_id,
    i.item_name_original,
    i.item_language,
    i.quantity,
    i.unit_price,
    i.amount,
    u.id as product_id,
    coalesce(i.category_id, u.category_id) as category_id
from input_data i
cross join upserted u;

with user_row as (
    select
        u.id as user_id,
        us.language_code
    from moneytrack.app_users u
    join moneytrack.user_settings us
        on us.user_id = u.id
    where u.telegram_user_id =
    {{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
)

select
    c.id,
    c.code,
    coalesce(t_user.name, t_ru.name, c.code) as name
from moneytrack.category_catalog c
join user_row u
    on u.user_id = c.user_id
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_user
    on t_user.category_id = c.id
   and t_user.language_code = u.language_code
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_ru
    on t_ru.category_id = c.id
   and t_ru.language_code = 'ru'
where c.is_active = true
order by c.sort_order, c.id;

with user_row as (
    select id as user_id
    from moneytrack.app_users
    where telegram_user_id =
    {{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
),

assignments as (
    select *
    from jsonb_to_recordset(
        $json${{ JSON.stringify($json.assignments || []) }}$json$::jsonb
    ) as x(
        product_id bigint,
        category_id bigint
    )
),

updated as (
    update moneytrack.product_catalog pc
    set category_id = a.category_id
    from assignments a
    join user_row u on true
    where pc.id = a.product_id
      and pc.user_id = u.user_id
      and a.category_id is not null
    returning pc.id
)

select count(*)::int as updated_count
from updated;

with products as (
    select distinct
        pc.id as product_id,
        pc.product_key,
        pc.original_name,
        pc.original_language
    from moneytrack.receipt_items ri
    join moneytrack.product_catalog pc
        on pc.id = ri.product_id
    where ri.receipt_id = {{ $json.receipt_id }}
      and pc.category_id is null
      and pc.is_active = true
)

select
    coalesce(
        jsonb_agg(
            jsonb_build_object(
                'product_id', p.product_id,
                'product_key', p.product_key,
                'original_name', p.original_name,
                'original_language', p.original_language
            )
        ),
        '[]'::jsonb
    ) as products,
    count(*)::int as uncategorized_count
from products p;

with user_row as (
select
{{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.report_currency }}'::text as report_currency
),
filtered_transactions as (
select t.*
from moneytrack.transactions t
join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
where t.transaction_date::date between '{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.date_from }}'::date and '{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.date_to }}'::date
and t.transaction_type in ('income','expense','adjustment')
),
summary_by_currency as (
select
t.currency_original as currency_code,
sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as income,
sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as expense,
sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as adjustment,
sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then -t.amount_original when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as result,
count(*) as operations_count
from filtered_transactions t
group by t.currency_original
),
converted as (
select
s.*,
u.report_currency,
case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as rate_to_report,
s.income * case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as income_report,
s.expense * case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as expense_report,
s.adjustment * case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as adjustment_report,
s.result * case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as result_report
from summary_by_currency s
cross join user_row u
left join lateral (
select er.rate
from moneytrack.exchange_rates er
where er.from_currency = s.currency_code
and er.to_currency = u.report_currency
and er.rate_date <= current_date
order by er.rate_date desc
limit 1
) er on true
)
select
'{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.period_label }}' as period_label,
'{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.period_key }}' as period_key,
'{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.date_from }}' as date_from,
'{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.date_to }}' as date_to,
report_currency,
currency_code,
income,
expense,
adjustment,
result,
income_report,
expense_report,
adjustment_report,
result_report,
rate_to_report,
operations_count
from converted
union all
select
'{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.period_label }}' as period_label,
'{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.period_key }}' as period_key,
'{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.date_from }}' as date_from,
'{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.date_to }}' as date_to,
u.report_currency,
null as currency_code,
null as income,
null as expense,
null as adjustment,
null as result,
null as income_report,
null as expense_report,
null as adjustment_report,
null as result_report,
null as rate_to_report,
0 as operations_count
from user_row u
where not exists (select 1 from summary_by_currency)
order by currency_code nulls last;

with user_row as (
select
{{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.base_currency }}'::text as base_currency,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.report_currency }}'::text as report_currency,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code
),
settings_row as (
select
'settings' as section,
u.base_currency,
u.report_currency,
u.language_code,
null::text as currency_code,
null::text as account_name
from user_row u
),
default_accounts as (
select
'default_account' as section,
null::text as base_currency,
null::text as report_currency,
null::text as language_code,
uda.currency_code,
a.name as account_name
from moneytrack.user_default_accounts uda
join user_row u on u.user_id = uda.user_id
left join moneytrack.accounts a on a.id = uda.account_id
),
currencies as (
select
'currency' as section,
null::text as base_currency,
null::text as report_currency,
null::text as language_code,
c.code as currency_code,
null::text as account_name
from moneytrack.currencies c
order by c.code
)
select *
from settings_row
union all
select *
from default_accounts
union all
select *
from currencies;

with params as (
    select
        '{{ $("Parse Last Parameters").first().json.operation_type || "all" }}'::text as operation_type,
        {{ $("Parse Last Parameters").first().json.limit || 10 }}::int as limit_value
),

user_row as (
    select {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as id
),

regular_ops as (
    select
        t.id,
        t.transaction_date,
        t.created_at,
        t.transaction_type as operation_type,
        t.amount_original as amount_from,
        t.currency_original as currency_from,
        null::numeric as amount_to,
        null::text as currency_to,
        coalesce(a.name, '-') as from_account_name,
        null::text as to_account_name,
        t.description,
        'transaction' as source
    from moneytrack.transactions t
    join user_row u on u.id = t.user_id
    left join moneytrack.accounts a on a.id = t.account_id
    where t.transaction_type in ('income', 'expense', 'adjustment', 'openingbalance')
),

transfer_ops as (
    select
        tr.id,
        tr.transfer_date as transaction_date,
        tr.created_at,
        tr.transfer_type as operation_type,
        tr.from_amount as amount_from,
        tr.from_currency as currency_from,
        tr.to_amount as amount_to,
        tr.to_currency as currency_to,
        coalesce(fa.name, '-') as from_account_name,
        coalesce(ta.name, '-') as to_account_name,
        tr.transfer_type as description,
        'transfer' as source
    from moneytrack.transfers tr
    join user_row u on u.id = tr.user_id
    left join moneytrack.accounts fa on fa.id = tr.from_account_id
    left join moneytrack.accounts ta on ta.id = tr.to_account_id
),

all_ops as (
    select * from regular_ops
    union all
    select * from transfer_ops
)

select a.*
from all_ops a
cross join params p
where p.operation_type = 'all'
   or a.operation_type = p.operation_type
order by a.transaction_date desc, a.created_at desc, a.id desc
limit (select limit_value from params);

select
    t.id,
    t.transaction_date,
    t.transaction_type,
    t.amount_original,
    t.currency_original,
    t.description
from moneytrack.transactions t
where t.user_id = {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}
order by
    t.transaction_date desc,
    t.id desc
limit 1;

with target_tx as (
    select
        t.id,
        t.description,
        t.amount_original,
        t.currency_original,
        t.transaction_date
    from moneytrack.transactions t
    where t.user_id = {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}
      and t.id = {{ $json.transaction_id }}
),

deleted_receipt_items as (
    delete from moneytrack.receipt_items ri
    using moneytrack.receipts r, target_tx tx
    where ri.receipt_id = r.id
      and r.transaction_id = tx.id
    returning ri.id
),

deleted_receipts as (
    delete from moneytrack.receipts r
    using target_tx tx
    where r.transaction_id = tx.id
    returning r.id
),

deleted_tx as (
    delete from moneytrack.transactions t
    using target_tx tx
    where t.id = tx.id
    returning
        t.id,
        t.description,
        t.amount_original,
        t.currency_original,
        t.transaction_date
)

select *
from deleted_tx;

select
    case
        when a.id is not null then a.id
        when uda.account_id is not null then uda.account_id
        else us.default_expense_account_id
    end as account_id,

    coalesce(
        a.name,
        uda_account.name,
        default_account.name
    ) as account_name

from moneytrack.app_users u

join moneytrack.user_settings us
    on us.user_id = u.id

left join moneytrack.accounts a
    on a.user_id = u.id
   and lower(regexp_replace(a.name,'[^a-zA-Z0-9]+','','g')) =
       lower(regexp_replace('{{ $('Get user context').first().json.message_caption || "" }}','[^a-zA-Z0-9]+','','g'))

left join moneytrack.user_default_accounts uda
    on uda.user_id = u.id
   and uda.currency_code = '{{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.currency || $('Get user settings').item.json.base_currency }}'

left join moneytrack.accounts uda_account
    on uda_account.id = uda.account_id

left join moneytrack.accounts default_account
    on default_account.id = us.default_expense_account_id

where u.telegram_user_id =
{{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }};

with input_data as (
    select
        {{ $json.transaction_id || "null" }}::bigint as transaction_id,
        '{{ String($json.account_hint || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text as account_hint
),

user_row as (
    select {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id
),

matched_account as (
    select
        a.id,
        a.name,
        a.code
    from moneytrack.accounts a
    join user_row u on u.user_id = a.user_id
    cross join input_data i
    where i.account_hint <> ''
      and (
          lower(a.code) = lower(i.account_hint)
          or lower(a.name) = lower(i.account_hint)
      )
    order by a.id
    limit 1
),

updated as (
    update moneytrack.transactions t
    set account_id = ma.id
    from matched_account ma, user_row u, input_data i
    where t.user_id = u.user_id
      and t.id = i.transaction_id
    returning
        t.id,
        ma.name,
        ma.code
)

select
    i.transaction_id,
    i.account_hint,
    u.id,
    u.name,
    u.code,
    case
        when i.transaction_id is null then 'invalid_command'
        when i.account_hint = '' then 'invalid_command'
        when u.id is null then 'not_found'
        else 'updated'
    end as status
from input_data i
left join updated u on true;

with input_data as (
select
    '{{ String($json.operation_type || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}'::text as operation_type,
    coalesce(
        nullif('{{ String($json.currency || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',''),
        nullif('{{ String($json.currency_original || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',''),
        nullif('{{ String($json.currency_code || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')
    )::text as currency_code,
    nullif('{{ String($json.account_hint || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as account_hint
),

user_row as (
select
    u.id as user_id,
    us.default_expense_account_id,
    us.default_income_account_id
from moneytrack.app_users u
join moneytrack.user_settings us
    on us.user_id = u.id
where u.telegram_user_id =
{{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
),

matched_account as (
select
    a.id,
    a.name,
    a.code
from moneytrack.accounts a
join user_row u
    on u.user_id = a.user_id
cross join input_data i
where i.account_hint is not null
  and i.account_hint <> ''
  and (
      lower(a.code) = lower(i.account_hint)
      or lower(a.name) = lower(i.account_hint)
      or lower(regexp_replace(a.name,'[^a-zA-Z0-9]+','','g')) =
         lower(regexp_replace(i.account_hint,'[^a-zA-Z0-9]+','','g'))
  )
order by
    case
        when lower(a.code) = lower(i.account_hint) then 0
        when lower(a.name) = lower(i.account_hint) then 1
        else 2
    end,
    length(a.name)
limit 1
),

user_default_account as (
select
    uda.account_id,
    a.name,
    a.code
from user_row u
cross join input_data i
join moneytrack.user_default_accounts uda
    on uda.user_id = u.user_id
   and uda.currency_code = i.currency_code
join moneytrack.accounts a
    on a.id = uda.account_id
where i.currency_code is not null
limit 1
),

fallback_account as (
select
    a.id,
    a.name,
    a.code
from user_row u
cross join input_data i
join moneytrack.accounts a
    on a.id =
       case
           when i.operation_type = 'income'
               then coalesce(u.default_income_account_id, u.default_expense_account_id)
           else u.default_expense_account_id
       end
limit 1
)

select
    coalesce(ma.id, uda.account_id, fa.id) as account_id,
    coalesce(ma.name, uda.name, fa.name) as account_name,
    coalesce(ma.code, uda.code, fa.code) as account_code
from input_data i
cross join user_row u
left join matched_account ma on true
left join user_default_account uda on true
left join fallback_account fa on true;

insert into moneytrack.transactions(
    user_id,
    account_id,
    transaction_type,
    amount_original,
    currency_original,
    amount_base,
    currency_base,
    exchange_rate,
    description,
    transaction_date,
    source_type
)
select
    u.id,
    {{ $json.account_id }},
    '{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").item.json.operation_type }}',
    {{ $("Parse transaction JSON").item.json.amount }},
    '{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").item.json.currency }}',
    {{ $("Parse transaction JSON").item.json.amount }},
    '{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").item.json.currency }}',
    1,
    '{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").item.json.description }}',
    coalesce(
        nullif(nullif('{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").item.json.transaction_date }}','null'),'undefined')::date,
        current_date
    ),
    'telegram_text'
from moneytrack.app_users u
where u.telegram_user_id={{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
returning id, account_id;

insert into moneytrack.transactions(
    user_id,
    account_id,
    transaction_type,
    amount_original,
    currency_original,
    amount_base,
    currency_base,
    exchange_rate,
    description,
    transaction_date,
    source_type
)
select
    u.id,
    {{ $json.account_id }},
    'adjustment',
    {{ $json.amount }},
    '{{ $json.currency }}',
    {{ $json.amount }},
    '{{ $json.currency }}',
    1,
    '{{ $json.description }}',
    coalesce(
        nullif(nullif('{{ $json.transaction_date }}','null'),'undefined')::date,
        current_date
    ),
    'telegram_text'
from moneytrack.app_users u
where u.telegram_user_id =
{{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
returning id;

with parsed as (
select
'{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.operation_type }}'::text as operation_type,
{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.from_account_hint ? "'" + String($("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.from_account_hint).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::text as from_account_hint,
{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.to_account_hint ? "'" + String($("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.to_account_hint).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::text as to_account_hint,
{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.amount_from || 0 }}::numeric as amount_from,
coalesce({{ $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.currency_from ? "'" + String($("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.currency_from).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::text,'{{ $("Get user context").first().json.base_currency }}') as currency_from,
{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.amount_to || $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.amount_from || 0 }}::numeric as amount_to,
coalesce({{ $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.currency_to ? "'" + String($("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.currency_to).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::text,coalesce({{ $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.currency_from ? "'" + String($("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.currency_from).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::text,'{{ $("Get user context").first().json.base_currency }}')) as currency_to,
{{ $("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.transaction_date ? "'" + String($("Parse transaction JSON").first().json.transaction_date).slice(0,10).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::date as transaction_date
),
user_row as (
select {{ $("Get user context").first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id
),
hints as (
select
lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(from_account_hint,''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) as from_hint,
lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(to_account_hint,''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) as to_hint
from parsed
),
normalized_accounts as (
select
a.id,
a.name,
a.code,
a.user_id,
a.currency_code,
lower(regexp_replace(a.name,'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) as norm_name,
lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(a.code,''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) as norm_code
from moneytrack.accounts a
join user_row u on u.user_id = a.user_id
where coalesce(a.is_active,true) = true
),
from_match_by_hint as (
select a.id,a.name,a.code
from normalized_accounts a
cross join hints h
where h.from_hint <> ''

with recursive user_row as (
    select
        {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as id,

),

transaction_movements as (
    select
        t.account_id,
        case
            when t.transaction_type = 'openingbalance' then t.amount_original
            when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original
            when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then -t.amount_original
            when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original
            else 0
        end as amount
    from moneytrack.transactions t
    join user_row u on u.id = t.user_id
),

transfer_movements as (
    select tr.from_account_id as account_id, -tr.from_amount as amount
    from moneytrack.transfers tr
    join user_row u on u.id = tr.user_id

    union all

    select tr.to_account_id as account_id, tr.to_amount as amount
    from moneytrack.transfers tr
    join user_row u on u.id = tr.user_id
),

balances as (
    select account_id, sum(amount) as balance
    from (
        select * from transaction_movements
        union all
        select * from transfer_movements
    ) m
    group by account_id
),

account_tree as (
    select
        a.id,
        a.parent_id,
        a.name,
        a.currency_code,
        a.sort_order,
        coalesce(b.balance, 0) as balance,
        0 as level,
        lpad(coalesce(a.sort_order, 999)::text, 5, '0') || '.' || a.name as path
    from moneytrack.accounts a
    join user_row u on u.id = a.user_id
    left join balances b on b.account_id = a.id
    where a.parent_id is null

    union all

    select
        c.id,
        c.parent_id,
        c.name,
        c.currency_code,
        c.sort_order,
        coalesce(b.balance, 0) as balance,
        p.level + 1 as level,
        p.path || '.' || lpad(coalesce(c.sort_order, 999)::text, 5, '0') || '.' || c.name as path
    from moneytrack.accounts c
    join account_tree p on p.id = c.parent_id
    left join balances b on b.account_id = c.id
)

select
    at.id,
    at.parent_id,
    at.name,
    at.currency_code,
    at.balance,
    at.level,
    at.sort_order,
    u.base_currency,
    case
        when at.currency_code = u.base_currency then 1
        else er.rate
    end as rate_to_base
from account_tree at
cross join user_row u
left join lateral (
    select rate
    from moneytrack.exchange_rates er
    where er.from_currency = at.currency_code
      and er.to_currency = u.base_currency
      and er.rate_date <= current_date
    order by er.rate_date desc
    limit 1
) er on true
order by at.path;

select exists (
select 1
from moneytrack.currencies c
where c.code = (select currency_code from input_data)
and coalesce(c.is_active,true) = true
) as currency_valid
),
categories as (
select
c.id,
c.user_id,
c.code,
coalesce(t_user.name,t_ru.name,c.code) as name,
lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(t_user.name,t_ru.name,c.code),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) as norm_name
from moneytrack.category_catalog c
cross join user_row u
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_user on t_user.category_id = c.id and t_user.language_code = u.language_code
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_ru on t_ru.category_id = c.id and t_ru.language_code = 'en'
where c.is_active = true
and (c.user_id = u.user_id or c.user_id = 0)
),
matched as (
select c.*
from categories c
cross join input_data i
where i.status = 'parsed'
and i.normalized_hint <> ''
and (
c.norm_name = i.normalized_hint
or c.norm_name like '%' || i.normalized_hint || '%'
or i.normalized_hint like '%' || c.norm_name || '%'
)
order by
case when c.norm_name = i.normalized_hint then 0 else 1 end,
case when c.user_id <> 0 then 0 else 1 end,
length(c.norm_name)
limit 1
)
select
i.status as parse_status,
i.category_hint,
m.id as category_id,
m.name as category_name,
i.amount,
i.currency_code,
i.recurrence_type,
i.recurrence_interval,
i.valid_from,
i.valid_to,
cc.currency_valid,
case
when i.status <> 'parsed' then 'invalid_command'
when cc.currency_valid = false then 'invalid_currency'
when m.id is null then 'category_not_found'
else 'resolved'
end as status
from input_data i
cross join currency_check cc
left join matched m on true;

{{ $json.recurrence_type ? "'" + String($json.recurrence_type).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::text as recurrence_type,
{{ $json.recurrence_interval || "null" }}::int as recurrence_interval,
{{ $json.valid_from ? "'" + new Date($json.valid_from).toISOString().slice(0,10) + "'" : "null" }}::date as valid_from,
{{ $json.valid_to ? "'" + new Date($json.valid_to).toISOString().slice(0,10) + "'" : "null" }}::date as valid_to

inserted as (
insert into moneytrack.budget_rules(user_id,category_id,name,amount,currency_code,recurrence_type,recurrence_interval,valid_from,valid_to,is_active)
select
u.user_id,
i.category_id,
i.category_name,
i.amount,
i.currency_code,
i.recurrence_type,
i.recurrence_interval,
i.valid_from,
i.valid_to,
true
from input_data i
cross join user_row u
where i.status = 'resolved'
returning id,category_id,name,amount,currency_code,recurrence_type,recurrence_interval,valid_from,valid_to
)
select
coalesce(ins.id,null) as id,
coalesce(ins.category_id,i.category_id) as category_id,
coalesce(ins.name,i.category_name) as name,
coalesce(ins.amount,i.amount) as amount,
coalesce(ins.currency_code,i.currency_code) as currency_code,
coalesce(ins.recurrence_type,i.recurrence_type) as recurrence_type,
coalesce(ins.recurrence_interval,i.recurrence_interval) as recurrence_interval,
coalesce(ins.valid_from,i.valid_from) as valid_from,

case when ins.id is not null then 'added' else i.status end as status
from input_data i

with input_data as (
select
{{ $json.action ? "'" + String($json.action).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::text as action,
{{ $json.budget_rule_id || "null" }}::bigint as budget_rule_id
),
user_row as (
select {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id
),
target_rule as (
select br.*
from moneytrack.budget_rules br
join user_row u on u.user_id = br.user_id
join input_data i on i.budget_rule_id = br.id
),
updated_rule as (
update moneytrack.budget_rules br
set is_active = case
when i.action = 'enable' then true
when i.action = 'disable' then false
else br.is_active
end
from target_rule tr
cross join input_data i
where br.id = tr.id
and i.action in ('enable','disable')
returning br.id,br.name,br.amount,br.currency_code,br.recurrence_type,br.recurrence_interval,br.valid_from,br.valid_to,br.is_active,i.action
),
deleted_rule as (
delete from moneytrack.budget_rules br
using target_rule tr,input_data i
where br.id = tr.id
and i.action = 'delete'
returning br.id,br.name,br.amount,br.currency_code,br.recurrence_type,br.recurrence_interval,br.valid_from,br.valid_to,false as is_active,i.action
),
result_row as (
select * from updated_rule
union all
select * from deleted_rule
)
select
rr.id,
rr.name,
rr.amount,
rr.currency_code,
rr.recurrence_type,
rr.recurrence_interval,
rr.valid_from,
rr.valid_to,
rr.is_active,
coalesce(rr.action,i.action) as action,
case
when i.action is null or i.budget_rule_id is null then 'invalid_command'
when rr.id is null then 'not_found'
else rr.action
end as status
from input_data i
left join result_row rr on true;

nullif('{{ $json.currency_code }}','')::text as currency_code
),
user_row as (
select {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id
),
currency_check as (
select exists (
select 1
from moneytrack.currencies c
where c.code = (select currency_code from input_data)
and coalesce(c.is_active,true) = true
) as is_valid
),
command_check as (
select
i.currency_type,
i.currency_code,
case
when i.currency_type not in ('base','report') then 'invalid_command'
when i.currency_code is null then 'invalid_command'
when cc.is_valid = false then 'invalid_currency'
else 'valid'
end as status
from input_data i
cross join currency_check cc
),
updated as (
update moneytrack.user_settings us
set
base_currency = case when c.currency_type = 'base' and c.status = 'valid' then c.currency_code else us.base_currency end,
report_currency = case when c.currency_type = 'report' and c.status = 'valid' then c.currency_code else us.report_currency end,
updated_at = now()
from command_check c
cross join user_row u
where us.user_id = u.user_id
returning us.base_currency,us.report_currency
),
available as (
select string_agg(code, ', ' order by code) as available_currencies
from moneytrack.currencies
where coalesce(is_active,true) = true
)
select
c.currency_type,
c.currency_code,
c.status,
case when c.status = 'valid' then true else false end as is_valid,
coalesce(u.base_currency,us.base_currency) as base_currency,
coalesce(u.report_currency,us.report_currency) as report_currency,
a.available_currencies
from command_check c
cross join user_row ur
cross join available a
left join updated u on true
left join moneytrack.user_settings us on us.user_id = ur.user_id;

),

select

'{{ $("Parse Report Budget Period").first().json.date_to }}'::date as date_to
),
active_rules as (
select br.*
from moneytrack.budget_rules br
join user_row u on u.user_id = br.user_id
cross join period p
where br.is_active = true
and br.valid_from <= p.date_to
and coalesce(br.valid_to,p.date_to) >= p.date_from
),
rule_occurrences as (
select
br.id,
br.category_id,
br.amount,
br.currency_code,
count(gs.d)::numeric as occurrences
from active_rules br
cross join period p
cross join lateral generate_series(
greatest(br.valid_from,p.date_from),
least(coalesce(br.valid_to,p.date_to),p.date_to),
interval '1 day'
) gs(d)
where (
br.recurrence_type = 'once'
and gs.d::date = br.valid_from
)
or (
br.recurrence_type = 'daily'
and ((gs.d::date - br.valid_from) % br.recurrence_interval) = 0
)
or (
br.recurrence_type = 'weekly'
and extract(dow from gs.d)::int = extract(dow from br.valid_from)::int
and floor((gs.d::date - br.valid_from) / 7)::int % br.recurrence_interval = 0
)
or (
br.recurrence_type = 'monthly'
and extract(day from gs.d)::int = extract(day from br.valid_from)::int
and (
(extract(year from gs.d)::int * 12 + extract(month from gs.d)::int) -
(extract(year from br.valid_from)::int * 12 + extract(month from br.valid_from)::int)
) % br.recurrence_interval = 0
)
or (
br.recurrence_type = 'yearly'
and extract(month from gs.d)::int = extract(month from br.valid_from)::int
and extract(day from gs.d)::int = extract(day from br.valid_from)::int
and (extract(year from gs.d)::int - extract(year from br.valid_from)::int) % br.recurrence_interval = 0
)
group by br.id,br.category_id,br.amount,br.currency_code
),
budget_plan as (
select
category_id,
currency_code,
sum(amount * occurrences) as plan_amount
from rule_occurrences
group by category_id,currency_code
),
receipt_fact as (
select
ri.category_id,
t.currency_original as currency_code,
sum(ri.amount) as fact_amount
from moneytrack.receipt_items ri
join moneytrack.receipts r on r.id = ri.receipt_id
join moneytrack.transactions t on t.id = r.transaction_id
join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
cross join period p
where t.transaction_type = 'expense'
and t.transaction_date::date between p.date_from and p.date_to
and ri.category_id is not null
group by ri.category_id,t.currency_original
),
manual_fact as (
select
t.category_id,
t.currency_original as currency_code,
sum(t.amount_original) as fact_amount
from moneytrack.transactions t
join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
cross join period p
where t.transaction_type = 'expense'
and t.transaction_date::date between p.date_from and p.date_to
and t.category_id is not null
and coalesce(t.source_type,'') <> 'receipt'
group by t.category_id,t.currency_original
),
fact_expenses as (
select
category_id,
currency_code,
sum(fact_amount) as fact_amount
from (
select category_id,currency_code,fact_amount from receipt_fact
union all
select category_id,currency_code,fact_amount from manual_fact
) x
group by category_id,currency_code
),
combined as (
select
coalesce(bp.category_id,fe.category_id) as category_id,
coalesce(bp.currency_code,fe.currency_code) as currency_code,
coalesce(bp.plan_amount,0) as plan_amount,
coalesce(fe.fact_amount,0) as fact_amount
from budget_plan bp
full join fact_expenses fe on fe.category_id = bp.category_id and fe.currency_code = bp.currency_code
),
converted as (
select
c.category_id,
coalesce(cat.show_in_budget_report,false) as show_in_budget_report,
coalesce(cat.budget_sort_order,cat.sort_order,999999) as sort_order,
coalesce(t_user.name,t_ru.name,cat.code,'Без категории') as category_name,
c.currency_code,
u.report_currency,
c.plan_amount * case when c.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as plan_report,
c.fact_amount * case when c.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as fact_report
from combined c
join user_row u on true
left join moneytrack.category_catalog cat on cat.id = c.category_id
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_user on t_user.category_id = c.category_id and t_user.language_code = u.language_code
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_ru on t_ru.category_id = c.category_id and t_ru.language_code = 'ru'
left join lateral (
select er.rate
from moneytrack.exchange_rates er
where er.from_currency = c.currency_code
and er.to_currency = u.report_currency
and er.rate_date <= current_date
order by er.rate_date desc
limit 1
) er on true
),
grouped as (
select
'{{ $("Parse Report Budget Period").first().json.period_label }}' as period_label,
report_currency,
case when show_in_budget_report then category_name else 'Прочее' end as category_name,
case when show_in_budget_report then sort_order else 999999 end as sort_order,
sum(coalesce(plan_report,0)) as plan_amount,
sum(coalesce(fact_report,0)) as fact_amount
from converted
group by report_currency,case when show_in_budget_report then category_name else 'Прочее' end,case when show_in_budget_report then sort_order else 999999 end
),
totals as (
select
coalesce(sum(plan_amount),0) as total_plan,
coalesce(sum(fact_amount),0) as total_fact
from grouped
)
select
g.period_label,
g.report_currency,
g.category_name,
g.plan_amount,
case when t.total_plan > 0 then g.plan_amount / t.total_plan * 100 else 0 end as plan_share,
g.fact_amount,
case when t.total_fact > 0 then g.fact_amount / t.total_fact * 100 else 0 end as fact_share,
g.plan_amount - g.fact_amount  as deviation,
case when g.plan_amount <> 0 then g.fact_amount / g.plan_amount * 100 else null end as execution_percent,
g.sort_order
from grouped g
cross join totals t
union all
select
'{{ $("Parse Report Budget Period").first().json.period_label }}' as period_label,
u.report_currency,
'__total__' as category_name,
t.total_plan as plan_amount,
case when t.total_plan > 0 then 100 else 0 end as plan_share,
t.total_fact as fact_amount,
case when t.total_fact > 0 then 100 else 0 end as fact_share,
t.total_plan - t.total_fact as deviation,
case when t.total_plan <> 0 then t.total_fact / t.total_plan * 100 else null end as execution_percent,
1000000 as sort_order
from user_row u
cross join totals t
order by sort_order,category_name;

with recursive user_row as (

{{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.report_currency }}'::text as report_currency
),
transaction_movements as (
select
t.account_id,
case
when t.transaction_type = 'openingbalance' then t.amount_original
when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original
when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then -t.amount_original
when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original
else 0
end as amount
from moneytrack.transactions t
join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
),
transfer_movements as (
select tr.from_account_id as account_id,-tr.from_amount as amount
from moneytrack.transfers tr
join user_row u on u.user_id = tr.user_id
union all
select tr.to_account_id as account_id,tr.to_amount as amount
from moneytrack.transfers tr
join user_row u on u.user_id = tr.user_id
),
movements as (
select * from transaction_movements
union all
select * from transfer_movements
),
account_balances as (
select
a.id,
a.parent_id,
a.name,
a.currency_code,
coalesce(sum(m.amount),0) as own_balance
from moneytrack.accounts a
join user_row u on u.user_id = a.user_id
left join movements m on m.account_id = a.id
where a.is_active = true
group by a.id,a.parent_id,a.name,a.currency_code
),
leaf_balances as (
select
ab.currency_code,
sum(ab.own_balance) as balance
from account_balances ab
where abs(ab.own_balance) > 0.000001
group by ab.currency_code
),
converted as (
select
lb.currency_code,
lb.balance,
u.report_currency,
case when lb.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as rate_to_report,
lb.balance * case when lb.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as balance_report
from leaf_balances lb
cross join user_row u
left join lateral (
select er.rate
from moneytrack.exchange_rates er
where er.from_currency = lb.currency_code
and er.to_currency = u.report_currency
and er.rate_date <= current_date
order by er.rate_date desc
limit 1
) er on true
),
totals as (
select
report_currency,
coalesce(sum(balance_report),0) as net_worth
from converted
group by report_currency
)
select *
from (
select
'currency' as row_type,
c.currency_code,
c.balance,
c.rate_to_report,
c.balance_report,
c.report_currency,
null::numeric as net_worth,
1 as sort_order
from converted c
union all
select
'total' as row_type,
null as currency_code,
null as balance,
null as rate_to_report,
null as balance_report,
t.report_currency,
t.net_worth,
2 as sort_order
from totals t
) x
order by sort_order,currency_code;

{{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,

values.content:
=Ты финансовый парсер.

Извлеки финансовую операцию из текста пользователя.

Валюта пользователя по умолчанию:
{{ $('Get user context').item.json.base_currency }}

Правила определения типа операции:

- Если пользователь написал покупку, оплату, расход или трату → operation_type="expense".
- Если пользователь написал доход, зарплату, возврат денег, поступление средств → operation_type="income".
- Если пользователь написал перевод между своими счетами без обмена валюты → operation_type="transfer".
- Если пользователь написал обмен валюты без явного перевода между разными счетами → operation_type="exchange".
- Если пользователь написал перевод между счетами с одновременной конвертацией валюты → operation_type="transferexchange".
- Если пользователь написал корректировку остатка, поправку баланса, ручную корректировку → operation_type="adjustment".
- Если пользователь написал "остаток", "входящий остаток", "начальный остаток", "сальдо на счёте", "opening balance" → operation_type="openingbalance".
- Если тип операции определить нельзя → operation_type="unknown".


Не используй operation_type="cash_withdrawal".

Снятие наличных — это transfer:
- from_account_hint = банковский счёт или карта
- to_account_hint = наличные / cash
- amount_from = сумма списания
- amount_to = сумма поступления наличных

Валюта:

- Если валюта явно указана, используй её.
- Если валюта не указана, используй валюту пользователя по умолчанию.
- Валюту возвращай кодом: EUR, USD, RUB, KZT и т.д.

Суммы:

- amount должен быть числом без валюты.
- Для expense, income и adjustment используй amount.
- Для transfer, exchange и transferexchange используй amount_from и amount_to.
- Если transfer без конвертации и указана только одна сумма, amount_from = amount_to.
- Если exchange_rate можно вычислить, не добавляй отдельное поле exchange_rate. Его посчитает система.

Описание:

- description должен содержать только краткое описание операции.
- Не включай сумму.
- Не включай валюту.
- Не включай названия счетов.
- Для transfer description = "перевод".
- Для exchange description = "обмен валют".
- Для transferexchange description = "перевод с конвертацией".
- Для adjustment description = "корректировка".

Счета:

- Если пользователь явно указал счет, карту, банк или кошелек для обычного expense/income/adjustment, заполни account_hint.
- Для transfer, exchange и transferexchange заполни from_account_hint и to_account_hint.
- Если счёт не указан, оставь соответствующее поле null.

ВАЖНО ДЛЯ account_hint:

Для expense, income и adjustment анализируй весь текст после суммы и валюты.

Если после суммы и валюты присутствуют дополнительные слова, похожие на название счёта, банка, карты, кошелька или наличных, обязательно сохраняй их в account_hint.

Не игнорируй слова после валюты.

Примеры:

"кофе 100 rub cash rub"
→ account_hint="cash rub"

"кофе 100 usd freedom usd"
→ account_hint="freedom usd"

"кофе 100 eur bbva"
→ account_hint="bbva"

"зарплата 2000 eur freedom eur"
→ account_hint="freedom eur"

Если указано несколько слов, относящихся к счёту, сохраняй их полностью.

Плохо:

"cash rub" → "cash"
"freedom usd" → "usd"

Правильно:

"cash rub" → "cash rub"
"freedom usd" → "freedom usd"
"bbva eur" → "bbva eur"

Если счёт не указан явно, account_hint=null.

Даты:

- Если дата не указана, transaction_date=null.
- Если дата указана явно, верни её в формате YYYY-MM-DD.

Примеры expense/income:

"кофе 3"
→ operation_type="expense"
→ amount=3
→ currency=валюта по умолчанию
→ description="кофе"
→ account_hint=null

"кофе 3 cash"
→ operation_type="expense"
→ amount=3
→ description="кофе"
→ account_hint="cash"

"кофе 3 с freedom eur"
→ operation_type="expense"
→ amount=3
→ description="кофе"
→ account_hint="freedom eur"

"зарплата 1500 на bbva"
→ operation_type="income"
→ amount=1500
→ description="зарплата"
→ account_hint="bbva"

Примеры transfer:

"перевел 100 с bbva на freedom"
→ operation_type="transfer"
→ from_account_hint="bbva"
→ to_account_hint="freedom"
→ amount_from=100
→ amount_to=100

"снял 300 в банкомате с bbva"
→ operation_type="transfer"
→ from_account_hint="bbva"
→ to_account_hint="cash"
→ amount_from=300
→ amount_to=300
→ description="снятие наличных"

Примеры exchange:

"обменял 100 EUR на 110 USD"
→ operation_type="exchange"
→ amount_from=100
→ currency_from="EUR"
→ amount_to=110
→ currency_to="USD"
→ description="обмен валют"

"купил 100 USD за 92 EUR"
→ operation_type="exchange"
→ amount_from=92
→ currency_from="EUR"
→ amount_to=100
→ currency_to="USD"
→ description="обмен валют"

Примеры transferexchange:

"перевел 100 EUR с bbva на freedom usd получил 108 USD"
→ operation_type="transferexchange"
→ from_account_hint="bbva"
→ to_account_hint="freedom usd"
→ amount_from=100
→ currency_from="EUR"
→ amount_to=108
→ currency_to="USD"
→ description="перевод с конвертацией"

"перевел с revolut eur на cash usd 200 EUR получил 215 USD"
→ operation_type="transferexchange"
→ from_account_hint="revolut eur"
→ to_account_hint="cash usd"
→ amount_from=200
→ currency_from="EUR"
→ amount_to=215
→ currency_to="USD"
→ description="перевод с конвертацией"

Примеры adjustment:

"корректировка freedom eur +50"
→ operation_type="adjustment"
→ account_hint="freedom eur"
→ amount=50
→ currency=валюта по умолчанию
→ description="корректировка"

"корректировка cash usd -12.35"
→ operation_type="adjustment"
→ account_hint="cash usd"
→ amount=-12.35
→ currency="USD"
→ description="корректировка"

Для transferexchange:

- часть после "с" / "из" — from_account_hint
- часть после "на" / "в" — to_account_hint
- если есть "получил", сумма после "получил" — amount_to/currency_to

Для openingbalance:

"остаток bbva 1250 eur"
→ operation_type="openingbalance"
→ account_hint="bbva"

    cross join input_data i

    order by r.created_at desc
    limit 1
),
mark_used as (
    update moneytrack.user_delete_requests r
    set used_at = now()
    from valid_request vr
    where r.id = vr.id
    returning r.id

    where cc.user_id = u.user_id
    returning cc.id
),

    using user_row u, valid_request vr

    returning uda.user_id
),
delete_accounts as (

    using user_row u, valid_request vr

),
delete_workspace_members as (
    delete from moneytrack.workspace_members wm

),
delete_workspaces as (
    delete from moneytrack.workspaces w
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where w.owner_user_id = u.user_id

),
delete_delete_requests as (
    delete from moneytrack.user_delete_requests r
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where r.user_id = u.user_id
    returning r.id
),
delete_user as (
    delete from moneytrack.app_users au
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where au.id = u.user_id
    returning au.id
)
select

        when (select confirmation_code from input_data) is null then 'invalid_command'
        when not exists (select 1 from valid_request) then 'invalid_or_expired'
        when exists (select 1 from delete_user) then 'deleted'
        else 'failed'
    end as status;

template_user as (
    select *
    from moneytrack.app_users
    where id = 0
),

template_settings as (
    select *
    from moneytrack.user_settings
    where user_id = 0
),

resolved_input as (
    select
        i.*,
        coalesce(l.code, ts.language_code, tu.language_code) as resolved_language_code,
        coalesce(ts.base_currency, tu.default_currency) as resolved_base_currency,
        coalesce(ts.report_currency, ts.base_currency, tu.default_currency) as resolved_report_currency
    from input_data i
    cross join template_user tu
    cross join template_settings ts
    left join moneytrack.languages l
        on l.code = i.telegram_language_code
),

user_upsert as (
    insert into moneytrack.app_users (
        telegram_user_id,
        username,
        first_name,
        language_code,
        default_currency
    )
    select
        telegram_user_id,
        telegram_username,
        telegram_first_name,
        resolved_language_code,
        resolved_base_currency
    from resolved_input
    on conflict (telegram_user_id) do update
    set
        username = excluded.username,
        first_name = excluded.first_name,
        language_code = coalesce(moneytrack.app_users.language_code, excluded.language_code),
        default_currency = coalesce(moneytrack.app_users.default_currency, excluded.default_currency)
    returning id, telegram_user_id
),

        is_active,
        created_at

        'Personal',
        'personal',
        u.id,
        true,
        now()
    from user_upsert u
    where not exists (
        select 1
        from moneytrack.workspaces w
        where w.owner_user_id = u.id
          and w.workspace_type = 'personal'
          and coalesce(w.is_active, true) = true
    )
    returning id, owner_user_id
),

    where w.workspace_type = 'personal'

    from workspace_insert wi

    limit 1

parent_template_accounts as (

),

parent_account_insert as (
    insert into moneytrack.accounts (
        user_id,
        code,
        name,
        account_type,
        currency_code,
        is_active,
        created_at,
        sort_order,
        parent_id
    )
    select
        u.id,
        ta.code,
        ta.name,
        ta.account_type,
        ta.currency_code,
        ta.is_active,
        now(),
        ta.sort_order,
        null
    from user_upsert u
    cross join parent_template_accounts ta
    where not exists (
        select 1
        from moneytrack.accounts a
        where a.user_id = u.id
          and a.code = ta.code
    )
    returning id, user_id, code
),

parent_account_map as (
    select
        ta.id as template_account_id,
        a.id as new_account_id,
        ta.code
    from template_accounts ta
    join user_upsert u on true
    join moneytrack.accounts a
        on a.user_id = u.id
       and a.code = ta.code
    where ta.parent_id is null

    union

    select
        ta.id as template_account_id,
        pai.id as new_account_id,
        ta.code
    from parent_account_insert pai
    join template_accounts ta
        on ta.code = pai.code
    where ta.parent_id is null
),

child_template_accounts as (
    select *
    from template_accounts
    where parent_id is not null
),

child_account_insert as (
    insert into moneytrack.accounts (
        user_id,
        code,
        name,
        account_type,
        currency_code,
        is_active,
        created_at,
        sort_order,
        parent_id
    )
    select
        u.id,
        ta.code,
        ta.name,
        ta.account_type,
        ta.currency_code,
        ta.is_active,
        now(),
        ta.sort_order,
        pm.new_account_id
    from user_upsert u
    join child_template_accounts ta on true
    join parent_account_map pm
        on pm.template_account_id = ta.parent_id
    where not exists (
        select 1
        from moneytrack.accounts a

    join template_accounts ta

with input_data as (

),

),

),

),

with input_data as (
select
    {{ $json.receipt_item_id || 'null' }}::bigint as receipt_item_id,
    nullif('{{ String($json.category_hint || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as category_hint,
    lower(regexp_replace(coalesce('{{ String($json.category_hint || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) as normalized_hint
),
user_row as (
select
    {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
    '{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code
),
target_item as (
select
    ri.id,
    ri.receipt_id,
    ri.item_name_original,
    ri.product_id,
    r.user_id,
    r.transaction_id
from moneytrack.receipt_items ri
join moneytrack.receipts r
    on r.id = ri.receipt_id
join user_row u
    on u.user_id = r.user_id
join input_data i
    on i.receipt_item_id = ri.id
),
matched_category as (
select
    c.id,
    c.code,
    t.name
from moneytrack.category_catalog c
join user_row u
    on u.user_id = c.user_id
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t
    on t.category_id = c.id
   and t.language_code = u.language_code
cross join input_data i
where i.category_hint is not null
and coalesce(c.is_active,true) = true
and (
    lower(c.code) = lower(i.category_hint)
    or lower(c.code) like '%' || lower(i.category_hint) || '%'
    or lower(t.name) = lower(i.category_hint)
    or lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(t.name,''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) = i.normalized_hint
    or lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(t.name,''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) like '%' || i.normalized_hint || '%'
)
order by
case
when lower(c.code) = lower(i.category_hint) then 0
when lower(t.name) = lower(i.category_hint) then 1
when lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(t.name,''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) = i.normalized_hint then 2
when lower(c.code) like '%' || lower(i.category_hint) || '%' then 3
else 4
end,
length(c.code) desc,
length(coalesce(t.name,c.code))
limit 1
),
update_item as (
update moneytrack.receipt_items ri
set category_id = mc.id
from target_item ti
cross join matched_category mc
where ri.id = ti.id
returning ri.id
),
update_product as (
update moneytrack.product_catalog pc
set category_id = mc.id
from target_item ti
cross join matched_category mc
where pc.id = ti.product_id
returning pc.id
)
select
    i.receipt_item_id,
    i.category_hint,
    ti.item_name_original,
    ti.product_id,
    mc.id as category_id,
    mc.code as category_code,
    mc.name as category_name,
    case
        when i.receipt_item_id is null then 'invalid_command'
        when i.category_hint is null then 'invalid_command'
        when ti.id is null then 'item_not_found'
        when mc.id is null then 'category_not_found'
        when not exists (select 1 from update_item) then 'item_not_found'
        else 'updated'
    end as status
from input_data i
left join target_item ti on true
left join matched_category mc on true;

with user_lang as (

'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.fallback_language_code }}'::text as fallback_language_code
),
ranked as (

m.module,

row_number() over (

order by case
when m.language_code = ul.language_code then 0
when m.language_code = ul.fallback_language_code then 1
else 2
end
) as rn
from moneytrack.i18n_messages m
cross join user_lang ul
where m.module in ('setitemcategory')
and m.language_code in (ul.language_code,ul.fallback_language_code)
)

message_text

parameters.text:
Extract receipt data from image.

Return only valid JSON.
No markdown.
Do not truncate JSON.
Use null for unknown values.

Fields:
shop_name,
receipt_date,
total_amount,
currency,
items.

Each item:
item_name_original,
item_language,
quantity,
unit_price,
amount.

Rules:

- item_language must be ISO 639-1 language code.
- Allowed values:
  en, ru, es, fr, de, kk, pt, it.
- Never return language names.
- Return "es" instead of "Spanish".
- Return "ru" instead of "Russian".
- Return "en" instead of "English".
- Preserve item_name_original exactly as printed on the receipt.

parameters.query:
insert into moneytrack.receipts (
user_id,
receipt_fingerprint,  
transaction_id,
telegram_file_id,
receipt_date,
shop_name,
total_amount,
currency,
raw_ai_json,
status
)
select
u.id,
'{{ $("Build receipt fingerprint").item.json.receipt_fingerprint }}',  
{{ $('Insert transaction').item.json.id }},
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_file_id }}',
coalesce(nullif('{{ $("Parse receipt JSON").item.json.receipt_date }}','null')::date,to_timestamp({{ $('Get user context').first().json.message_date }})::date),
'{{ $("Parse receipt JSON").item.json.shop_name }}',
{{ $("Parse receipt JSON").item.json.total_amount }},
'{{ $("Parse receipt JSON").item.json.currency }}',
'{{ JSON.stringify($("Parse receipt JSON").item.json).replaceAll("'","''") }}'::jsonb,
'parsed'
from moneytrack.app_users u
where u.telegram_user_id={{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
returning id;

insert into moneytrack.transactions(user_id,account_id,transaction_type,amount_original,currency_original,amount_base,currency_base,exchange_rate,description,transaction_date,source_type)
select 
  u.id,
  {{ $("Resolve account").item.json.account_id }},
  'expense',
  {{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.total_amount }},
  '{{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.currency }}',
  {{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.total_amount }},
  '{{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.currency }}',
  1,
  '{{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.shop_name }}',
  coalesce(nullif('{{ $('Parse receipt JSON').item.json.receipt_date }}','null')::timestamp,current_timestamp),
  'receipt'
from moneytrack.app_users u
where u.telegram_user_id={{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
returning id;

with input_data as (
    select
        {{ $json.receipt_id }}::bigint as receipt_id,
        '{{ String($json.item_name_original || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text as item_name_original,
        {{ $json.item_language ? "'" + $json.item_language + "'" : "null" }}::text as item_language,
        {{ $json.quantity }}::numeric as quantity,
        {{ $json.unit_price }}::numeric as unit_price,
        {{ $json.amount }}::numeric as amount,
        {{ $json.category_id || "null" }}::bigint as category_id
),

user_row as (
    select id as user_id
    from moneytrack.app_users
    where telegram_user_id =
    {{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
),

upserted as (
    insert into moneytrack.product_catalog (
        user_id,
        product_key,
        original_name,
        original_language,
        category_id,
        is_active,
        created_at
    )
    select
        u.user_id,
        lower(regexp_replace(i.item_name_original, '[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+', '_', 'g')),
        i.item_name_original,
        i.item_language,
        i.category_id,
        true,
        now()
    from input_data i
    cross join user_row u
    where i.item_name_original <> ''
    on conflict (user_id, product_key)
    do update set
        original_name = excluded.original_name,
        original_language = coalesce(moneytrack.product_catalog.original_language, excluded.original_language),
        is_active = true
    returning id, category_id
)

select
    i.receipt_id,
    i.item_name_original,
    i.item_language,
    i.quantity,
    i.unit_price,
    i.amount,
    u.id as product_id,
    coalesce(i.category_id, u.category_id) as category_id
from input_data i
cross join upserted u;

with user_row as (
    select
        u.id as user_id,
        us.language_code
    from moneytrack.app_users u
    join moneytrack.user_settings us
        on us.user_id = u.id
    where u.telegram_user_id =
    {{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
)

select
    c.id,
    c.code,
    coalesce(t_user.name, t_ru.name, c.code) as name
from moneytrack.category_catalog c
join user_row u
    on u.user_id = c.user_id
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_user
    on t_user.category_id = c.id
   and t_user.language_code = u.language_code
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_ru
    on t_ru.category_id = c.id
   and t_ru.language_code = 'ru'
where c.is_active = true
order by c.sort_order, c.id;

with user_row as (
    select id as user_id
    from moneytrack.app_users
    where telegram_user_id =
    {{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}
),

assignments as (
    select *
    from jsonb_to_recordset(
        $json${{ JSON.stringify($json.assignments || []) }}$json$::jsonb
    ) as x(
        product_id bigint,
        category_id bigint
    )
),

updated as (
    update moneytrack.product_catalog pc
    set category_id = a.category_id
    from assignments a
    join user_row u on true
    where pc.id = a.product_id
      and pc.user_id = u.user_id
      and a.category_id is not null
    returning pc.id
)

select count(*)::int as updated_count
from updated;

with products as (
    select distinct
        pc.id as product_id,
        pc.product_key,
        pc.original_name,
        pc.original_language
    from moneytrack.receipt_items ri
    join moneytrack.product_catalog pc
        on pc.id = ri.product_id
    where ri.receipt_id = {{ $json.receipt_id }}
      and pc.category_id is null
      and pc.is_active = true
)

select
    coalesce(
        jsonb_agg(
            jsonb_build_object(
                'product_id', p.product_id,
                'product_key', p.product_key,
                'original_name', p.original_name,
                'original_language', p.original_language
            )
        ),
        '[]'::jsonb
    ) as products,
    count(*)::int as uncategorized_count
from products p;

with user_row as (
select
{{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.report_currency }}'::text as report_currency
),
filtered_transactions as (
select t.*
from moneytrack.transactions t
join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
where t.transaction_date::date between '{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.date_from }}'::date and '{{ $("Parse Summary Period").first().json.date_to }}'::date
and t.transaction_type in ('income','expense','adjustment')
),
summary_by_currency as (
select
t.currency_original as currency_code,
sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as income,
sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as expense,
sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as adjustment,
sum(case when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then -t.amount_original when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original else 0 end) as result,
count(*) as operations_count
from filtered_transactions t
group by t.currency_original
),
converted as (
select
s.*,
u.report_currency,
case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as rate_to_report,
s.income * case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as income_report,
s.expense * case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as expense_report,
s.adjustment * case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as adjustment_report,
s.result * case when s.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as result_report
from summary_by_currency s
cross join user_row u
left join lateral (
select er.rate
from moneytrack.exchange_rates er
where er.from_currency = s.currency_code
and er.to_currency = u.report_currency
and er.rate_date <= current_date
order by er.rate_date desc
limit 1
) er on true
)

from parsed
),
normalized_accounts as (

order by case when a.norm_code = h.from_hint then 0 when a.norm_name = h.from_hint then 1 when a.norm_name like '%' || h.from_hint || '%' then 2 else 3 end,length(a.norm_name)

order by case when a.norm_code = h.to_hint then 0 when a.norm_name = h.to_hint then 1 when a.norm_name like '%' || h.to_hint || '%' then 2 else 3 end,length(a.norm_name)

p.to_account_hint
from parsed p

            when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original
            when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then -t.amount_original

            else 0
        end as amount
    from moneytrack.transactions t
    join user_row u on u.id = t.user_id

    from moneytrack.transfers tr
    join user_row u on u.id = tr.user_id

    select tr.to_account_id as account_id, tr.to_amount as amount
    from moneytrack.transfers tr
    join user_row u on u.id = tr.user_id
),

balances as (
    select account_id, sum(amount) as balance
    from (
        select * from transaction_movements
        union all
        select * from transfer_movements
    ) m
    group by account_id
),

account_tree as (
    select
        a.id,
        a.parent_id,
        a.name,
        a.currency_code,
        a.sort_order,
        coalesce(b.balance, 0) as balance,
        0 as level,
        lpad(coalesce(a.sort_order, 999)::text, 5, '0') || '.' || a.name as path
    from moneytrack.accounts a
    join user_row u on u.id = a.user_id
    left join balances b on b.account_id = a.id
    where a.parent_id is null

    union all

    select
        c.id,
        c.parent_id,
        c.name,
        c.currency_code,
        c.sort_order,
        coalesce(b.balance, 0) as balance,
        p.level + 1 as level,
        p.path || '.' || lpad(coalesce(c.sort_order, 999)::text, 5, '0') || '.' || c.name as path
    from moneytrack.accounts c
    join account_tree p on p.id = c.parent_id
    left join balances b on b.account_id = c.id
)

select

    at.name,

        when at.currency_code = u.base_currency then 1

    end as rate_to_base
from account_tree at

order by at.path;

with input_data as (
select
'{{ $json.currency_type }}'::text as currency_type,
nullif('{{ $json.currency_code }}','')::text as currency_code
),
user_row as (
select {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id
),
currency_check as (
select exists (
select 1
from moneytrack.currencies c
where c.code = (select currency_code from input_data)
and coalesce(c.is_active,true) = true
) as is_valid
),
command_check as (
select
i.currency_type,
i.currency_code,
case
when i.currency_type not in ('base','report') then 'invalid_command'
when i.currency_code is null then 'invalid_command'
when cc.is_valid = false then 'invalid_currency'
else 'valid'
end as status
from input_data i
cross join currency_check cc
),
updated as (
update moneytrack.user_settings us
set
base_currency = case when c.currency_type = 'base' and c.status = 'valid' then c.currency_code else us.base_currency end,
report_currency = case when c.currency_type = 'report' and c.status = 'valid' then c.currency_code else us.report_currency end,
updated_at = now()
from command_check c
cross join user_row u
where us.user_id = u.user_id
returning us.base_currency,us.report_currency
),
available as (
select string_agg(code, ', ' order by code) as available_currencies
from moneytrack.currencies
where coalesce(is_active,true) = true
)
select
c.currency_type,
c.currency_code,
c.status,
case when c.status = 'valid' then true else false end as is_valid,
coalesce(u.base_currency,us.base_currency) as base_currency,
coalesce(u.report_currency,us.report_currency) as report_currency,
a.available_currencies
from command_check c
cross join user_row ur
cross join available a
left join updated u on true
left join moneytrack.user_settings us on us.user_id = ur.user_id;

with user_row as (
select
{{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.report_currency }}'::text as report_currency,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code
),
period as (
select
'{{ $("Parse Report Budget Period").first().json.date_from }}'::date as date_from,
'{{ $("Parse Report Budget Period").first().json.date_to }}'::date as date_to
),
active_rules as (
select br.*
from moneytrack.budget_rules br
join user_row u on u.user_id = br.user_id
cross join period p
where br.is_active = true
and br.valid_from <= p.date_to
and coalesce(br.valid_to,p.date_to) >= p.date_from
),
rule_occurrences as (
select
br.id,
br.category_id,
br.amount,
br.currency_code,
count(gs.d)::numeric as occurrences
from active_rules br
cross join period p
cross join lateral generate_series(
greatest(br.valid_from,p.date_from),
least(coalesce(br.valid_to,p.date_to),p.date_to),
interval '1 day'
) gs(d)
where (
br.recurrence_type = 'once'
and gs.d::date = br.valid_from
)
or (
br.recurrence_type = 'daily'
and ((gs.d::date - br.valid_from) % br.recurrence_interval) = 0
)
or (
br.recurrence_type = 'weekly'
and extract(dow from gs.d)::int = extract(dow from br.valid_from)::int
and floor((gs.d::date - br.valid_from) / 7)::int % br.recurrence_interval = 0
)
or (
br.recurrence_type = 'monthly'
and extract(day from gs.d)::int = extract(day from br.valid_from)::int
and (
(extract(year from gs.d)::int * 12 + extract(month from gs.d)::int) -
(extract(year from br.valid_from)::int * 12 + extract(month from br.valid_from)::int)
) % br.recurrence_interval = 0
)
or (
br.recurrence_type = 'yearly'
and extract(month from gs.d)::int = extract(month from br.valid_from)::int
and extract(day from gs.d)::int = extract(day from br.valid_from)::int
and (extract(year from gs.d)::int - extract(year from br.valid_from)::int) % br.recurrence_interval = 0
)
group by br.id,br.category_id,br.amount,br.currency_code
),
budget_plan as (
select
category_id,
currency_code,
sum(amount * occurrences) as plan_amount
from rule_occurrences
group by category_id,currency_code
),
receipt_fact as (
select
ri.category_id,
t.currency_original as currency_code,
sum(ri.amount) as fact_amount
from moneytrack.receipt_items ri
join moneytrack.receipts r on r.id = ri.receipt_id
join moneytrack.transactions t on t.id = r.transaction_id
join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
cross join period p
where t.transaction_type = 'expense'
and t.transaction_date::date between p.date_from and p.date_to
and ri.category_id is not null
group by ri.category_id,t.currency_original
),
manual_fact as (
select
t.category_id,
t.currency_original as currency_code,
sum(t.amount_original) as fact_amount
from moneytrack.transactions t
join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
cross join period p
where t.transaction_type = 'expense'
and t.transaction_date::date between p.date_from and p.date_to
and t.category_id is not null
and coalesce(t.source_type,'') <> 'receipt'
group by t.category_id,t.currency_original
),
fact_expenses as (
select
category_id,
currency_code,
sum(fact_amount) as fact_amount
from (
select category_id,currency_code,fact_amount from receipt_fact
union all
select category_id,currency_code,fact_amount from manual_fact
) x
group by category_id,currency_code
),
combined as (
select
coalesce(bp.category_id,fe.category_id) as category_id,
coalesce(bp.currency_code,fe.currency_code) as currency_code,
coalesce(bp.plan_amount,0) as plan_amount,
coalesce(fe.fact_amount,0) as fact_amount
from budget_plan bp
full join fact_expenses fe on fe.category_id = bp.category_id and fe.currency_code = bp.currency_code
),
converted as (
select
c.category_id,
coalesce(cat.show_in_budget_report,false) as show_in_budget_report,
coalesce(cat.budget_sort_order,cat.sort_order,999999) as sort_order,
coalesce(t_user.name,t_ru.name,cat.code,'Без категории') as category_name,
c.currency_code,
u.report_currency,
c.plan_amount * case when c.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as plan_report,
c.fact_amount * case when c.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as fact_report
from combined c
join user_row u on true
left join moneytrack.category_catalog cat on cat.id = c.category_id
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_user on t_user.category_id = c.category_id and t_user.language_code = u.language_code
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t_ru on t_ru.category_id = c.category_id and t_ru.language_code = 'ru'
left join lateral (
select er.rate
from moneytrack.exchange_rates er
where er.from_currency = c.currency_code
and er.to_currency = u.report_currency
and er.rate_date <= current_date
order by er.rate_date desc
limit 1
) er on true
),
grouped as (
select
'{{ $("Parse Report Budget Period").first().json.period_label }}' as period_label,
report_currency,
case when show_in_budget_report then category_name else 'Прочее' end as category_name,
case when show_in_budget_report then sort_order else 999999 end as sort_order,
sum(coalesce(plan_report,0)) as plan_amount,
sum(coalesce(fact_report,0)) as fact_amount
from converted
group by report_currency,case when show_in_budget_report then category_name else 'Прочее' end,case when show_in_budget_report then sort_order else 999999 end
),
totals as (
select
coalesce(sum(plan_amount),0) as total_plan,
coalesce(sum(fact_amount),0) as total_fact
from grouped
)
select
g.period_label,
g.report_currency,
g.category_name,
g.plan_amount,
case when t.total_plan > 0 then g.plan_amount / t.total_plan * 100 else 0 end as plan_share,
g.fact_amount,
case when t.total_fact > 0 then g.fact_amount / t.total_fact * 100 else 0 end as fact_share,
g.plan_amount - g.fact_amount  as deviation,
case when g.plan_amount <> 0 then g.fact_amount / g.plan_amount * 100 else null end as execution_percent,
g.sort_order
from grouped g
cross join totals t
union all
select
'{{ $("Parse Report Budget Period").first().json.period_label }}' as period_label,
u.report_currency,
'__total__' as category_name,
t.total_plan as plan_amount,
case when t.total_plan > 0 then 100 else 0 end as plan_share,
t.total_fact as fact_amount,
case when t.total_fact > 0 then 100 else 0 end as fact_share,
t.total_plan - t.total_fact as deviation,
case when t.total_plan <> 0 then t.total_fact / t.total_plan * 100 else null end as execution_percent,
1000000 as sort_order
from user_row u
cross join totals t
order by sort_order,category_name;

end
) as rn
from moneytrack.i18n_messages m

)
select module,message_key,message_text

with recursive user_row as (
select
{{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.report_currency }}'::text as report_currency
),
transaction_movements as (
select
t.account_id,
case
when t.transaction_type = 'openingbalance' then t.amount_original
when t.transaction_type = 'income' then t.amount_original
when t.transaction_type = 'expense' then -t.amount_original
when t.transaction_type = 'adjustment' then t.amount_original
else 0
end as amount
from moneytrack.transactions t
join user_row u on u.user_id = t.user_id
),
transfer_movements as (
select tr.from_account_id as account_id,-tr.from_amount as amount
from moneytrack.transfers tr
join user_row u on u.user_id = tr.user_id
union all
select tr.to_account_id as account_id,tr.to_amount as amount
from moneytrack.transfers tr
join user_row u on u.user_id = tr.user_id
),
movements as (
select * from transaction_movements
union all
select * from transfer_movements
),
account_balances as (
select
a.id,
a.parent_id,
a.name,
a.currency_code,
coalesce(sum(m.amount),0) as own_balance
from moneytrack.accounts a
join user_row u on u.user_id = a.user_id
left join movements m on m.account_id = a.id
where a.is_active = true
group by a.id,a.parent_id,a.name,a.currency_code
),
leaf_balances as (
select
ab.currency_code,
sum(ab.own_balance) as balance
from account_balances ab
where abs(ab.own_balance) > 0.000001
group by ab.currency_code
),
converted as (
select
lb.currency_code,
lb.balance,
u.report_currency,
case when lb.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as rate_to_report,
lb.balance * case when lb.currency_code = u.report_currency then 1 else er.rate end as balance_report
from leaf_balances lb
cross join user_row u
left join lateral (
select er.rate
from moneytrack.exchange_rates er
where er.from_currency = lb.currency_code
and er.to_currency = u.report_currency
and er.rate_date <= current_date
order by er.rate_date desc
limit 1
) er on true
),
totals as (
select
report_currency,
coalesce(sum(balance_report),0) as net_worth
from converted
group by report_currency
)
select *
from (
select
'currency' as row_type,
c.currency_code,
c.balance,
c.rate_to_report,
c.balance_report,
c.report_currency,
null::numeric as net_worth,
1 as sort_order
from converted c
union all
select
'total' as row_type,
null as currency_code,
null as balance,
null as rate_to_report,
null as balance_report,
t.report_currency,
t.net_worth,
2 as sort_order
from totals t
) x
order by sort_order,currency_code;

with user_row as (

{{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
