values.content:
=Ты финансовый парсер.

Извлеки финансовую операцию из текста пользователя.

Валюта пользователя по умолчанию:
{{ $('Get user context').item.json.base_currency }}

Правила определения типа операции:

- Если пользователь написал покупку, оплату, расход или трату → operation_type="expense".
- Если пользователь написал доход, зарплату, возврат денег, поступление средств → operation_type="income".
- Если пользователь написал перевод между своими счетами без обмена валюты → operation_type="transfer".
- Если пользователь написал обмен валюты без явного перевода между разными счетами → operation_type="exchange".
- Если пользователь написал перевод между счетами с одновременной конвертацией валюты → operation_type="transferexchange".
- Если пользователь написал корректировку остатка, поправку баланса, ручную корректировку → operation_type="adjustment".
- Если пользователь написал "остаток", "входящий остаток", "начальный остаток", "сальдо на счёте", "opening balance" → operation_type="openingbalance".
- Если тип операции определить нельзя → operation_type="unknown".


Не используй operation_type="cash_withdrawal".

Снятие наличных — это transfer:
- from_account_hint = банковский счёт или карта
- to_account_hint = наличные / cash
- amount_from = сумма списания
- amount_to = сумма поступления наличных

Валюта:

- Если валюта явно указана, используй её.
- Если валюта не указана, используй валюту пользователя по умолчанию.
- Валюту возвращай кодом: EUR, USD, RUB, KZT и т.д.

Суммы:

- amount должен быть числом без валюты.
- Для expense, income и adjustment используй amount.
- Для transfer, exchange и transferexchange используй amount_from и amount_to.
- Если transfer без конвертации и указана только одна сумма, amount_from = amount_to.
- Если exchange_rate можно вычислить, не добавляй отдельное поле exchange_rate. Его посчитает система.

Описание:

- description должен содержать только краткое описание операции.
- Не включай сумму.
- Не включай валюту.
- Не включай названия счетов.
- Для transfer description = "перевод".
- Для exchange description = "обмен валют".
- Для transferexchange description = "перевод с конвертацией".
- Для adjustment description = "корректировка".

Счета:

- Если пользователь явно указал счет, карту, банк или кошелек для обычного expense/income/adjustment, заполни account_hint.
- Для transfer, exchange и transferexchange заполни from_account_hint и to_account_hint.
- Если счёт не указан, оставь соответствующее поле null.

ВАЖНО ДЛЯ account_hint:

Для expense, income и adjustment анализируй весь текст после суммы и валюты.

Если после суммы и валюты присутствуют дополнительные слова, похожие на название счёта, банка, карты, кошелька или наличных, обязательно сохраняй их в account_hint.

Не игнорируй слова после валюты.

Примеры:

"кофе 100 rub cash rub"
→ account_hint="cash rub"

"кофе 100 usd freedom usd"
→ account_hint="freedom usd"

"кофе 100 eur bbva"
→ account_hint="bbva"

"зарплата 2000 eur freedom eur"
→ account_hint="freedom eur"

Если указано несколько слов, относящихся к счёту, сохраняй их полностью.

Плохо:

"cash rub" → "cash"
"freedom usd" → "usd"

Правильно:

"cash rub" → "cash rub"
"freedom usd" → "freedom usd"
"bbva eur" → "bbva eur"

Если счёт не указан явно, account_hint=null.

Даты:

- Если дата не указана, transaction_date=null.
- Если дата указана явно, верни её в формате YYYY-MM-DD.

Примеры expense/income:

"кофе 3"
→ operation_type="expense"
→ amount=3
→ currency=валюта по умолчанию
→ description="кофе"
→ account_hint=null

"кофе 3 cash"
→ operation_type="expense"
→ amount=3
→ description="кофе"
→ account_hint="cash"

"кофе 3 с freedom eur"
→ operation_type="expense"
→ amount=3
→ description="кофе"
→ account_hint="freedom eur"

"зарплата 1500 на bbva"
→ operation_type="income"
→ amount=1500
→ description="зарплата"
→ account_hint="bbva"

Примеры transfer:

"перевел 100 с bbva на freedom"
→ operation_type="transfer"
→ from_account_hint="bbva"
→ to_account_hint="freedom"
→ amount_from=100
→ amount_to=100

"снял 300 в банкомате с bbva"
→ operation_type="transfer"
→ from_account_hint="bbva"
→ to_account_hint="cash"
→ amount_from=300
→ amount_to=300
→ description="снятие наличных"

Примеры exchange:

"обменял 100 EUR на 110 USD"
→ operation_type="exchange"
→ amount_from=100
→ currency_from="EUR"
→ amount_to=110
→ currency_to="USD"
→ description="обмен валют"

"купил 100 USD за 92 EUR"
→ operation_type="exchange"
→ amount_from=92
→ currency_from="EUR"
→ amount_to=100
→ currency_to="USD"
→ description="обмен валют"

Примеры transferexchange:

"перевел 100 EUR с bbva на freedom usd получил 108 USD"
→ operation_type="transferexchange"
→ from_account_hint="bbva"
→ to_account_hint="freedom usd"
→ amount_from=100
→ currency_from="EUR"
→ amount_to=108
→ currency_to="USD"
→ description="перевод с конвертацией"

"перевел с revolut eur на cash usd 200 EUR получил 215 USD"
→ operation_type="transferexchange"
→ from_account_hint="revolut eur"
→ to_account_hint="cash usd"
→ amount_from=200
→ currency_from="EUR"
→ amount_to=215
→ currency_to="USD"
→ description="перевод с конвертацией"

Примеры adjustment:

"корректировка freedom eur +50"
→ operation_type="adjustment"
→ account_hint="freedom eur"
→ amount=50
→ currency=валюта по умолчанию
→ description="корректировка"

"корректировка cash usd -12.35"
→ operation_type="adjustment"
→ account_hint="cash usd"
→ amount=-12.35
→ currency="USD"
→ description="корректировка"

Для transferexchange:

- часть после "с" / "из" — from_account_hint
- часть после "на" / "в" — to_account_hint
- если есть "получил", сумма после "получил" — amount_to/currency_to

Для openingbalance:

"остаток bbva 1250 eur"
→ operation_type="openingbalance"
→ account_hint="bbva"
→ amount=1250
→ currency="EUR"
→ description="входящий остаток"

"входящий остаток freedom usd 500"
→ operation_type="openingbalance"
→ account_hint="freedom usd"
→ amount=500
→ currency="USD"
→ description="входящий остаток"

"остаток cash rub 3000"
→ operation_type="openingbalance"
→ account_hint="cash rub"
→ amount=3000
→ currency="RUB"
→ description="входящий остаток"

Верни только JSON.
Не используй markdown.
Не добавляй пояснений.

Формат:

{
  "operation_type": "expense|income|transfer|exchange|transferexchange|adjustment|openingbalance|unknown",
  "amount": null,
  "currency": null,
  "description": "",
  "account_hint": null,
  "from_account_hint": null,
  "to_account_hint": null,
  "amount_from": null,
  "currency_from": null,
  "amount_to": null,
  "currency_to": null,
  "transaction_date": null
}

with user_lang as (
select
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.fallback_language_code }}'::text as fallback_language_code
),
ranked as (
select
m.module,
m.message_key,
m.message_text,
row_number() over (
partition by m.module,m.message_key
order by case
when m.language_code = ul.language_code then 0
when m.language_code = ul.fallback_language_code then 1
else 2
end
) as rn
from moneytrack.i18n_messages m
cross join user_lang ul
where m.module in ('start','common')
and m.language_code in (ul.language_code,ul.fallback_language_code)
)
select module,message_key,message_text
from ranked
where rn = 1
order by module,message_key;

with user_upsert as (
insert into moneytrack.app_users(telegram_user_id,username,first_name,language_code)
values (
{{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }},
'{{ String($('Get user context').first().json.telegram_username || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
'{{ String($('Get user context').first().json.telegram_first_name || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
'{{ String($('Get user context').first().json.telegram_language_code || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}'
)
on conflict (telegram_user_id) do update
set username=excluded.username,first_name=excluded.first_name,language_code=excluded.language_code
returning id,telegram_user_id,language_code,first_name
),
defaults as (
select
max(value) filter (where key='default_language_code') as default_language_code,
max(value) filter (where key='fallback_language_code') as fallback_language_code,
max(value) filter (where key='default_base_currency') as default_base_currency,
max(value) filter (where key='default_report_currency') as default_report_currency
from moneytrack.app_settings
),
existing_settings as (
select us.*
from moneytrack.user_settings us
join user_upsert u on u.id=us.user_id
),
workspace_insert as (
insert into moneytrack.workspaces(name,workspace_type,owner_user_id,is_active,created_at)
select coalesce(nullif(u.first_name,''),'User') || ' workspace','personal',u.id,true,now()
from user_upsert u
left join existing_settings es on true
where es.current_workspace_id is null
returning id,owner_user_id
),
workspace_row as (
select wi.id as workspace_id,wi.owner_user_id as user_id
from workspace_insert wi
union all
select es.current_workspace_id as workspace_id,es.user_id
from existing_settings es
where es.current_workspace_id is not null
),
settings_upsert as (
insert into moneytrack.user_settings(user_id,language_code,base_currency,report_currency,current_workspace_id,created_at,updated_at)
select
u.id,
coalesce(nullif(u.language_code,''),d.default_language_code),
d.default_base_currency,
d.default_report_currency,
wr.workspace_id,
now(),
now()
from user_upsert u
cross join defaults d
join workspace_row wr on wr.user_id=u.id
on conflict(user_id) do update
set language_code=coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.language_code,excluded.language_code),
base_currency=coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.base_currency,excluded.base_currency),
report_currency=coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.report_currency,excluded.report_currency),
current_workspace_id=coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.current_workspace_id,excluded.current_workspace_id),
updated_at=now()
returning user_id,language_code,base_currency,report_currency,current_workspace_id
),
member_upsert as (
insert into moneytrack.workspace_members(workspace_id,user_id,role,is_active,created_at)
select su.current_workspace_id,su.user_id,'owner',true,now()
from settings_upsert su
where su.current_workspace_id is not null
on conflict(workspace_id,user_id)
do update set role='owner',is_active=true
returning workspace_id,user_id,role,is_active
)
select
u.id as user_id,
u.telegram_user_id,
su.language_code,
su.base_currency,
su.report_currency,
su.current_workspace_id as workspace_id,
mu.role as workspace_role
from user_upsert u
join settings_upsert su on su.user_id=u.id
left join member_upsert mu on mu.user_id=u.id;

with input_data as (
    select {{ $json.confirmation_code ? "'" + String($json.confirmation_code).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::text as confirmation_code
),
user_row as (
    select
        {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
        {{ $('Get user context').first().json.telegram_user_id }}::bigint as telegram_user_id
),
valid_request as (
    select r.*
    from moneytrack.user_delete_requests r
    join user_row u on u.user_id = r.user_id
    cross join input_data i
    where r.confirmation_code = i.confirmation_code
      and r.used_at is null
      and r.expires_at >= now()
    order by r.created_at desc
    limit 1
),
mark_used as (
    update moneytrack.user_delete_requests r
    set used_at = now()
    from valid_request vr
    where r.id = vr.id
    returning r.id
),
target_receipts as (
    select r.id
    from moneytrack.receipts r
    join user_row u on u.user_id = r.user_id
),
delete_receipt_items as (
    delete from moneytrack.receipt_items ri
    using target_receipts tr, valid_request vr
    where ri.receipt_id = tr.id
    returning ri.id
),
delete_receipts as (
    delete from moneytrack.receipts r
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where r.user_id = u.user_id
    returning r.id
),
delete_transfers as (
    delete from moneytrack.transfers t
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where t.user_id = u.user_id
    returning t.id
),
delete_transactions as (
    delete from moneytrack.transactions t
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where t.user_id = u.user_id
    returning t.id
),
delete_budget_rules as (
    delete from moneytrack.budget_rules br
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where br.user_id = u.user_id
    returning br.id
),
delete_products as (
    delete from moneytrack.product_catalog pc
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where pc.user_id = u.user_id
    returning pc.id
),
delete_categories as (
    delete from moneytrack.category_catalog cc
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where cc.user_id = u.user_id
    returning cc.id
),
delete_defaults as (
    delete from moneytrack.user_default_accounts uda
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where uda.user_id = u.user_id
    returning uda.user_id
),
delete_accounts as (
    delete from moneytrack.accounts a
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where a.user_id = u.user_id
    returning a.id
),
delete_settings as (
    delete from moneytrack.user_settings us
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where us.user_id = u.user_id
    returning us.user_id
),
delete_currencies as (
    delete from moneytrack.user_currencies uc
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where uc.user_id = u.user_id
    returning uc.user_id
),
delete_workspace_members as (
    delete from moneytrack.workspace_members wm
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where wm.user_id = u.user_id
    returning wm.workspace_id
),
delete_workspaces as (
    delete from moneytrack.workspaces w
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where w.owner_user_id = u.user_id
    returning w.id
),
delete_delete_requests as (
    delete from moneytrack.user_delete_requests r
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where r.user_id = u.user_id
    returning r.id
),
delete_user as (
    delete from moneytrack.app_users au
    using user_row u, valid_request vr
    where au.id = u.user_id
    returning au.id
)
select
    case
        when (select confirmation_code from input_data) is null then 'invalid_command'
        when not exists (select 1 from valid_request) then 'invalid_or_expired'
        when exists (select 1 from delete_user) then 'deleted'
        else 'failed'
    end as status;

select
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.fallback_language_code }}'::text as fallback_language_code
),
ranked as (

m.module,

m.message_text,
row_number() over (
partition by m.module,m.message_key
order by case
when m.language_code = ul.language_code then 0

else 2

with input_data as (
    select
        {{ $json.telegram_user_id }}::bigint as telegram_user_id,
        {{ $json.telegram_chat_id }}::bigint as telegram_chat_id,
        nullif('{{ String($json.telegram_username || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as telegram_username,
        nullif('{{ String($json.telegram_first_name || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as telegram_first_name,
        nullif('{{ String($json.telegram_language_code || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as telegram_language_code,
        nullif('{{ String($json.message_text || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as message_text,
        nullif('{{ String($json.message_caption || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as message_caption,
        {{ $json.message_date || "null" }}::bigint as message_date,
        nullif('{{ String($json.message_type || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as message_type,
        nullif('{{ String($json.telegram_file_id || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as telegram_file_id,
        {{ $json.test_mode === true ? 'true' : 'false' }}::boolean as test_mode,
        $json${{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_message || {}) }}$json$::jsonb as raw_message
),

template_user as (
    select *
    from moneytrack.app_users
    where id = 0
),

template_settings as (
    select *
    from moneytrack.user_settings
    where user_id = 0
),

resolved_input as (
    select
        i.*,
        coalesce(l.code, ts.language_code, tu.language_code) as resolved_language_code,
        coalesce(ts.base_currency, tu.default_currency) as resolved_base_currency,
        coalesce(ts.report_currency, ts.base_currency, tu.default_currency) as resolved_report_currency
    from input_data i
    cross join template_user tu
    cross join template_settings ts
    left join moneytrack.languages l
        on l.code = i.telegram_language_code
),

user_upsert as (
    insert into moneytrack.app_users (
        telegram_user_id,
        username,
        first_name,
        language_code,
        default_currency
    )
    select
        telegram_user_id,
        telegram_username,
        telegram_first_name,
        resolved_language_code,
        resolved_base_currency
    from resolved_input
    on conflict (telegram_user_id) do update
    set
        username = excluded.username,
        first_name = excluded.first_name,
        language_code = coalesce(moneytrack.app_users.language_code, excluded.language_code),
        default_currency = coalesce(moneytrack.app_users.default_currency, excluded.default_currency)
    returning id, telegram_user_id
),

workspace_insert as (
    insert into moneytrack.workspaces (
        name,
        workspace_type,
        owner_user_id,
        is_active,
        created_at
    )
    select
        'Personal',
        'personal',
        u.id,
        true,
        now()
    from user_upsert u
    where not exists (
        select 1
        from moneytrack.workspaces w
        where w.owner_user_id = u.id
          and w.workspace_type = 'personal'
          and coalesce(w.is_active, true) = true
    )
    returning id, owner_user_id
),

workspace_row as (
    select w.id, w.owner_user_id
    from moneytrack.workspaces w
    join user_upsert u
        on u.id = w.owner_user_id
    where w.workspace_type = 'personal'
      and coalesce(w.is_active, true) = true

    union all

    select wi.id, wi.owner_user_id
    from workspace_insert wi

    limit 1
),

workspace_member_upsert as (
    insert into moneytrack.workspace_members (
        workspace_id,
        user_id,
        role,
        is_active,
        created_at
    )
    select
        wr.id,
        wr.owner_user_id,
        'owner',
        true,
        now()
    from workspace_row wr
    on conflict (workspace_id, user_id) do update
    set
        role = excluded.role,
        is_active = true
),

template_accounts as (
    select *
    from moneytrack.accounts
    where user_id = 0
),

parent_template_accounts as (
    select *
    from template_accounts
    where parent_id is null
),

parent_account_insert as (
    insert into moneytrack.accounts (
        user_id,
        code,
        name,
        account_type,
        currency_code,
        is_active,
        created_at,
        sort_order,
        parent_id
    )
    select
        u.id,
        ta.code,
        ta.name,
        ta.account_type,
        ta.currency_code,
        ta.is_active,
        now(),
        ta.sort_order,
        null
    from user_upsert u
    cross join parent_template_accounts ta
    where not exists (
        select 1
        from moneytrack.accounts a
        where a.user_id = u.id
          and a.code = ta.code
    )
    returning id, user_id, code
),

parent_account_map as (
    select
        ta.id as template_account_id,
        a.id as new_account_id,
        ta.code
    from template_accounts ta
    join user_upsert u on true
    join moneytrack.accounts a
        on a.user_id = u.id
       and a.code = ta.code
    where ta.parent_id is null

    union

    select
        ta.id as template_account_id,
        pai.id as new_account_id,
        ta.code
    from parent_account_insert pai
    join template_accounts ta
        on ta.code = pai.code
    where ta.parent_id is null
),

child_template_accounts as (
    select *
    from template_accounts
    where parent_id is not null
),

child_account_insert as (
    insert into moneytrack.accounts (
        user_id,
        code,
        name,
        account_type,
        currency_code,
        is_active,
        created_at,
        sort_order,
        parent_id
    )
    select
        u.id,
        ta.code,
        ta.name,
        ta.account_type,
        ta.currency_code,
        ta.is_active,
        now(),
        ta.sort_order,
        pm.new_account_id
    from user_upsert u
    join child_template_accounts ta on true
    join parent_account_map pm
        on pm.template_account_id = ta.parent_id
    where not exists (
        select 1
        from moneytrack.accounts a
        where a.user_id = u.id
          and a.code = ta.code
    )
    returning id, user_id, code
),

account_map as (
    select
        ta.id as template_account_id,
        a.id as new_account_id,
        ta.code,
        ta.currency_code
    from template_accounts ta
    join user_upsert u on true
    join moneytrack.accounts a
        on a.user_id = u.id
       and a.code = ta.code

    union

    select
        ta.id as template_account_id,
        pai.id as new_account_id,
        ta.code,
        ta.currency_code
    from parent_account_insert pai
    join template_accounts ta
        on ta.code = pai.code

    union

    select
        ta.id as template_account_id,
        cai.id as new_account_id,
        ta.code,
        ta.currency_code
    from child_account_insert cai
    join template_accounts ta
        on ta.code = cai.code
),

default_accounts_upsert as (
    insert into moneytrack.user_default_accounts (
        user_id,
        currency_code,
        account_id
    )
    select
        u.id,
        uda.currency_code,
        am.new_account_id
    from moneytrack.user_default_accounts uda
    join account_map am
        on am.template_account_id = uda.account_id
    join user_upsert u on true
    where uda.user_id = 0
    on conflict (user_id, currency_code) do nothing
),

template_default_accounts as (
    select
        ts.default_expense_account_id as template_default_expense_account_id,
        ts.default_income_account_id as template_default_income_account_id
    from template_settings ts
),


template_categories as (
select *
from moneytrack.category_catalog
where user_id = 0
),
parent_template_categories as (
select *
from template_categories
where parent_id is null
),
parent_category_insert as (
insert into moneytrack.category_catalog (
    user_id,
    code,
    parent_id,
    is_active,
    sort_order,
    created_at,
    show_in_budget_report,
    budget_sort_order
)
select
    u.id,
    tc.code,
    null,
    tc.is_active,
    tc.sort_order,
    now(),
    tc.show_in_budget_report,
    tc.budget_sort_order
from user_upsert u
cross join parent_template_categories tc
where not exists (
    select 1
    from moneytrack.category_catalog c
    where c.user_id = u.id
      and c.code = tc.code
)
returning id, user_id, code
),
parent_category_map as (
select
    tc.id as template_category_id,
    c.id as new_category_id,
    tc.code
from template_categories tc
join user_upsert u on true
join moneytrack.category_catalog c
    on c.user_id = u.id
   and c.code = tc.code
where tc.parent_id is null
union
select
    tc.id as template_category_id,
    pci.id as new_category_id,
    tc.code
from parent_category_insert pci
join template_categories tc
    on tc.code = pci.code
where tc.parent_id is null
),
child_template_categories as (
select *
from template_categories
where parent_id is not null
),
child_category_insert as (
insert into moneytrack.category_catalog (
    user_id,
    code,
    parent_id,
    is_active,
    sort_order,
    created_at,
    show_in_budget_report,
    budget_sort_order
)
select
    u.id,
    tc.code,
    pcm.new_category_id,
    tc.is_active,
    tc.sort_order,
    now(),
    tc.show_in_budget_report,
    tc.budget_sort_order
from user_upsert u
join child_template_categories tc on true
join parent_category_map pcm
    on pcm.template_category_id = tc.parent_id
where not exists (
    select 1
    from moneytrack.category_catalog c
    where c.user_id = u.id
      and c.code = tc.code
)
returning id, user_id, code
),
category_map as (
select
    tc.id as template_category_id,
    c.id as new_category_id,
    tc.code
from template_categories tc
join user_upsert u on true
join moneytrack.category_catalog c
    on c.user_id = u.id
   and c.code = tc.code
union
select
    tc.id as template_category_id,
    pci.id as new_category_id,
    tc.code
from parent_category_insert pci
join template_categories tc
    on tc.code = pci.code
union
select
    tc.id as template_category_id,
    cci.id as new_category_id,
    tc.code
from child_category_insert cci
join template_categories tc
    on tc.code = cci.code
),
category_translations_insert as (
insert into moneytrack.category_catalog_translations (
    category_id,
    language_code,
    name
)
select
    cm.new_category_id,
    t.language_code,
    t.name
from moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t
join category_map cm
    on cm.template_category_id = t.category_id
where not exists (
    select 1
    from moneytrack.category_catalog_translations existing
    where existing.category_id = cm.new_category_id
      and existing.language_code = t.language_code
)
),


settings_upsert as (
    insert into moneytrack.user_settings (
        user_id,
        language_code,
        base_currency,
        report_currency,
        default_expense_account_id,
        default_income_account_id,
        current_workspace_id,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    )
    select
        u.id,
        r.resolved_language_code,
        r.resolved_base_currency,
        r.resolved_report_currency,
        exp_map.new_account_id,
        inc_map.new_account_id,
        wr.id,
        now(),
        now()
    from user_upsert u
    cross join resolved_input r
    cross join template_default_accounts tda
    left join account_map exp_map
        on exp_map.template_account_id = tda.template_default_expense_account_id
    left join account_map inc_map
        on inc_map.template_account_id = tda.template_default_income_account_id
    left join workspace_row wr
        on wr.owner_user_id = u.id
    on conflict (user_id) do update
    set
        language_code = coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.language_code, excluded.language_code),
        base_currency = coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.base_currency, excluded.base_currency),
        report_currency = coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.report_currency, excluded.report_currency),
        default_expense_account_id = coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.default_expense_account_id, excluded.default_expense_account_id),
        default_income_account_id = coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.default_income_account_id, excluded.default_income_account_id),
        current_workspace_id = coalesce(moneytrack.user_settings.current_workspace_id, excluded.current_workspace_id),
        updated_at = now()
    returning
        user_id,
        language_code,
        base_currency,
        report_currency,
        default_expense_account_id,
        default_income_account_id,
        current_workspace_id
)

select
    u.id as user_id,
    r.test_mode,
    r.telegram_user_id,
    r.telegram_chat_id,
    r.telegram_username,
    r.telegram_first_name,
    r.telegram_language_code,
    r.message_text,
    r.message_caption,
    r.message_date,
    r.message_type,
    r.telegram_file_id,
    r.raw_message,
    s.language_code,
    s.language_code as fallback_language_code,
    s.base_currency,
    s.report_currency,
    s.current_workspace_id as workspace_id,
    s.default_expense_account_id,
    s.default_income_account_id
from user_upsert u
cross join resolved_input r
join settings_upsert s
    on s.user_id = u.id;

with input_data as (
select
'{{ $json.base_currency }}'::text as base_currency,
{{ $json.target_currency ? "'" + String($json.target_currency).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::text as target_currency,
{{ $json.rate_date ? "'" + String($json.rate_date).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : "null" }}::date as requested_date
),
target_date as (
select
coalesce(
    i.requested_date,
    (
        select max(rate_date)
        from moneytrack.exchange_rates
        where from_currency = i.base_currency
    )
) as rate_date,
i.base_currency,
i.target_currency
from input_data i
),
rates as (
select
e.rate_date,
e.from_currency,
e.to_currency,
e.rate,
e.source
from moneytrack.exchange_rates e
join target_date d
  on d.rate_date = e.rate_date
 and d.base_currency = e.from_currency
where d.target_currency is null
   or e.to_currency = d.target_currency
)
select
rate_date,
from_currency,
to_currency,
rate,
source
from rates
order by to_currency;

with user_lang as (
select
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.fallback_language_code }}'::text as fallback_language_code
),
ranked as (
select
m.module,
m.message_key,
m.message_text,
row_number() over (
partition by m.module,m.message_key
order by case
when m.language_code = ul.language_code then 0
when m.language_code = ul.fallback_language_code then 1
else 2
end
) as rn
from moneytrack.i18n_messages m
cross join user_lang ul
where m.module = 'fx'
and m.language_code in (ul.language_code,ul.fallback_language_code)
)
select module,message_key,message_text
from ranked
where rn = 1
order by message_key;

with input_data as (
select
    {{ $json.transaction_id || 'null' }}::bigint as transaction_id
),
user_row as (
select
    {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
    '{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code
),
target_receipt as (
select
    r.id,
    r.transaction_id,
    r.shop_name,
    r.total_amount,
    r.currency,
    r.receipt_date
from moneytrack.receipts r
join user_row u
    on u.user_id = r.user_id
cross join input_data i
where (
        i.transaction_id is not null
        and r.transaction_id = i.transaction_id
      )
   or (
        i.transaction_id is null
        and r.id = (
            select r2.id
            from moneytrack.receipts r2
            where r2.user_id = u.user_id
            order by r2.created_at desc
            limit 1
        )
      )
limit 1
)
select
    tr.id as receipt_id,
    tr.transaction_id,
    tr.shop_name,
    tr.total_amount,
    tr.currency,
    tr.receipt_date,
    ri.id as receipt_item_id,
    ri.item_name_original,
    ri.quantity,
    ri.unit_price,
    ri.amount,
    coalesce(ri.category_id, pc.category_id) as category_id,
    cc.code as category_code,
    cct.name as category_name
from target_receipt tr
join moneytrack.receipt_items ri
    on ri.receipt_id = tr.id
left join moneytrack.product_catalog pc
    on pc.id = ri.product_id
left join moneytrack.category_catalog cc
    on cc.id = coalesce(ri.category_id, pc.category_id)
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations cct
    on cct.category_id = cc.id
   and cct.language_code = (
        select language_code
        from user_row
        limit 1
   )
order by ri.id;

with user_lang as (
select
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.fallback_language_code }}'::text as fallback_language_code
),
ranked as (
select
m.module,
m.message_key,
m.message_text,
row_number() over (
partition by m.module,m.message_key
order by case
when m.language_code = ul.language_code then 0
when m.language_code = ul.fallback_language_code then 1
else 2
end
) as rn
from moneytrack.i18n_messages m
cross join user_lang ul
where m.module in ('receiptitems')
and m.language_code in (ul.language_code,ul.fallback_language_code)
)
select
module,
message_key,
message_text
from ranked
where rn = 1
order by module,message_key;

with input_data as (
select
    {{ $json.receipt_item_id || 'null' }}::bigint as receipt_item_id,
    nullif('{{ String($json.category_hint || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}','')::text as category_hint,
    lower(regexp_replace(coalesce('{{ String($json.category_hint || "").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) as normalized_hint
),
user_row as (
select
    {{ $('Get user context').first().json.user_id }}::bigint as user_id,
    '{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code
),
target_item as (
select
    ri.id,
    ri.receipt_id,
    ri.item_name_original,
    ri.product_id,
    r.user_id,
    r.transaction_id
from moneytrack.receipt_items ri
join moneytrack.receipts r
    on r.id = ri.receipt_id
join user_row u
    on u.user_id = r.user_id
join input_data i
    on i.receipt_item_id = ri.id
),
matched_category as (
select
    c.id,
    c.code,
    t.name
from moneytrack.category_catalog c
join user_row u
    on u.user_id = c.user_id
left join moneytrack.category_catalog_translations t
    on t.category_id = c.id
   and t.language_code = u.language_code
cross join input_data i
where i.category_hint is not null
and coalesce(c.is_active,true) = true
and (
    lower(c.code) = lower(i.category_hint)
    or lower(c.code) like '%' || lower(i.category_hint) || '%'
    or lower(t.name) = lower(i.category_hint)
    or lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(t.name,''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) = i.normalized_hint
    or lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(t.name,''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) like '%' || i.normalized_hint || '%'
)
order by
case
when lower(c.code) = lower(i.category_hint) then 0
when lower(t.name) = lower(i.category_hint) then 1
when lower(regexp_replace(coalesce(t.name,''),'[^a-zA-Zа-яА-Я0-9]+','','g')) = i.normalized_hint then 2
when lower(c.code) like '%' || lower(i.category_hint) || '%' then 3
else 4
end,
length(c.code) desc,
length(coalesce(t.name,c.code))
limit 1
),
update_item as (
update moneytrack.receipt_items ri
set category_id = mc.id
from target_item ti
cross join matched_category mc
where ri.id = ti.id
returning ri.id
),
update_product as (
update moneytrack.product_catalog pc
set category_id = mc.id
from target_item ti
cross join matched_category mc
where pc.id = ti.product_id
returning pc.id
)
select
    i.receipt_item_id,
    i.category_hint,
    ti.item_name_original,
    ti.product_id,
    mc.id as category_id,
    mc.code as category_code,
    mc.name as category_name,
    case
        when i.receipt_item_id is null then 'invalid_command'
        when i.category_hint is null then 'invalid_command'
        when ti.id is null then 'item_not_found'
        when mc.id is null then 'category_not_found'
        when not exists (select 1 from update_item) then 'item_not_found'
        else 'updated'
    end as status
from input_data i
left join target_item ti on true
left join matched_category mc on true;

with user_lang as (
select
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.language_code }}'::text as language_code,
'{{ $('Get user context').first().json.fallback_language_code }}'::text as fallback_language_code
),
ranked as (
select
m.module,
m.message_key,
m.message_text,
row_number() over (
partition by m.module,m.message_key
order by case
when m.language_code = ul.language_code then 0
when m.language_code = ul.fallback_language_code then 1
else 2
end
) as rn
from moneytrack.i18n_messages m

where m.module in ('setitemcategory')
and m.language_code in (ul.language_code,ul.fallback_language_code)
)
select
module,
message_key,
message_text
from ranked
where rn = 1
order by module,message_key;
